kinyarwanda.search_by_name_meaning_clade_or_place: Shakisha ukoresheje izina, igisobanuro, clade, cyangwa ahantu...
kinyarwanda.first_life_simple_microbes: Ubuzima bwa mbere — udukoko duto tworoshye
kinyarwanda.first_four_legged_animals_walk_on_land: Inyamaswa za mbere z'amaguru ane zigenda ku butaka
kinyarwanda.the_great_dying_end_permian_extinction: Urupfu Rukomeye (kurimbuka mu mpera ya Permian)
kinyarwanda.asteroid_non_bird_dinosaurs_end: Asteroyide — iherezo rya dinosaurs zitari inyoni
kinyarwanda.map_of_where_dinosaur_fossils_are_foun: Ikarita y'aho ibisigazwa bya dinosaur biboneka uyu munsi, ku migabane
kinyarwanda.dozens_of_dinosaurs_are_preserved_with: Dinosaurs nyinshi zabitswe zifite amababa, kuva ku byoya byoroshye kugeza ku mababa nyayo yo guhaguruka. Nyinshi zari zifite amababa igihe kirekire mbere y'uko n'imwe muri zo ishobora guhaguruka.
kinyarwanda.birds_have_a_furcula_or_wishbone_so_di: Inyoni zifite furcula, cyangwa igufwa ry'icyifuzo. Dinosaurs za theropod nka T. rex na Velociraptor na zo zari zizifite. Ni igufwa rimwe nyabwo.
kinyarwanda.bird_bones_are_light_and_filled_with_a: Amagufwa y'inyoni aroroshye kandi yuzuyemo udusakoshi tw'umwuka. Amagufwa amwe yuzuyemo umwuka agaragara muri dinosaurs nyinshi, igice cy'uburyo bwo guhumeka busa n'ubw'inyoni.
kinyarwanda.the_classic_bird_footprint_three_toes_: Ikirenge cy'inyoni gisanzwe, intoki eshatu imbere, gihuye n'ibirenge bya theropod. Ibirenge by'ibisigazwa bya dinosaur bigaragara nk'ibirenge binini by'inyoni.
kinyarwanda.dinosaurs_laid_eggs_in_nests_and_some_: Dinosaurs zabikaga amagi mu byari maze zimwe, nka Citipati na Oviraptor, zicaraga hejuru yayo zororera abana bazo, nk'uko inyoni zibikora.
kinyarwanda.birds_fold_their_wings_using_a_special: Inyoni zikunja amababa yazo zikoresheje igufwa ry'akaboko ridasanzwe rifite ishusho y'ukwezi gukacye. Igufwa rimwe ryatumaga zimwe muri dinosaurs zireka amaboko yazo ku mubiri.
kinyarwanda.growth_rings_in_dinosaur_bones_show_ma: Impeta z'ukura mu magufwa ya dinosaur zerekana ko nyinshi zakuze vuba kandi zifite amaraso ashyushye, zisa n'inyoni n'inyamabere kurusha ibikururuka bya none.
